column1: Shohei Ohtani leads off for the Dodgers at home with a strong track record of consistency and a favorable platoon advantage against Michael Lorenzen, making him a reliable pick to record a hit. Freddie Freeman also draws the platoon edge in the same matchup and has been steady all season, offering similar reliability. Luis Arraez brings excellent contact skills and the highest percentage of games with a hit among the group, while Ketel Marte and Pete Crow-Armstrong both benefit from advantageous matchups.
